name: Aunt Lila's Snowball Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Cream the sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add the vanilla and nuts. Gradually add the flour. Roll into small balls. Place on a baking sheet, and bake for 15 to 20 minutes at 350 degrees. Roll baked balls in powdered sugar while still warm.
